meaning: adj.(荷兰画家)蒙德里安的 (以抽象几何图案等为特点的) 蒙德里安绘画风格的
examples: And what about artists such as Mondrian, whose paintings consist exclusively of horizontal and vertical lines encasing blocks of colour?
Of the pioneers, he likes Kandinsky least, Mondrian most, and feels greatest affection for Malevich.
In great work typified by Mondrian, Stella and Rothko, conceptual power is the be all and end all.
